text: Persons who abuse alcohol or drugs are a danger to themselves, to other employees and the productive work environment. People have the right to work in an alcohol and drug-free environment and to work with persons free from the effects of alcohol and drugs. GS Mountain reserves the right to test anyone for drugs and alcohol our on our projects. All trade partners, regardless of tier level performing work on a GS Mountain project, must have a Substance Abuse Program that requires at a minimum:
